skills.name: find-skills
skills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities.

skills.name: generate-image
skills.description: Generate images using AI (DALL-E 3) via OpenAI API. Use when the user wants to create an image, draw something, or generate visual assets.
